quote: The truth is not something outside to be discovered, it is something inside to be realized.
Freedom begins when you see that you are not the thinker.
Peace comes from within. Do not seek it without.
Nature does not hurry, yet everything is accomplished.
He who has a why to live can bear almost any how.
The soul is healed by being with children.
A book must be the axe for the frozen sea within us.
Everyone thinks of changing the world, but no one thinks of changing himself.
Your pain is the breaking of the shell that encloses your understanding.
Man cannot remake himself without suffering, for he is both the marble and the sculptor.
Life begins where fear ends.
Truth is a pathless land.
What you think, you become.
He who knows himself is enlightened.
Become who you are.
The darker the night, the brighter the stars.
Paths are made by walking.
If you want to be happy, be.
Sadness is but a wall between two gardens.
Without self-knowledge, without understanding the working of one's machine, man cannot be free.
Be realistic: plan for a miracle.
To understand yourself is the beginning of wisdom.
Three things cannot be long hidden: the sun, the moon and the truth.
When I let go of what I am, I become what I might be.
That which does not kill us makes us stronger.
Pain and suffering are always inevitable for a large intelligence.
I am free, and that is why I am lost.
All great literature is one of two stories: a man goes on a journey or a stranger comes to town.
Beauty is eternity gazing at itself in a mirror.
Remember yourself always and everywhere.
The moment you accept yourself, you become beautiful.
Observation without evaluation is the highest form of intelligence.
Every morning we are born again.
Silence is a source of great strength.
In every real man a child is hidden that wants to play.
To live without hope is to cease to live.
You do not need to leave your room. Remain sitting at your table and listen.
Love is life.
Out of suffering have emerged the strongest souls.
Awakening begins when a man sees his own sleep.
Love is the goal, life is the journey.
It is no measure of health to be well adjusted to a profoundly sick society.
Nothing can harm you as much as your own thoughts unguarded.
At the center of your being you have the answer.
And those who were seen dancing were thought insane by those who could not hear the music.
Love in action is a harsh and dreadful thing compared to love in dreams.
Start with what is right rather than what is acceptable.
Wrong does not cease to be wrong because the majority share in it.
Tenderness and kindness are not signs of weakness.
Only conscious suffering has meaning.
Be — don't try to become.
The ability to observe without distortion is intelligence.
No one saves us but ourselves.
Knowing others is wisdom; knowing yourself is enlightenment.
There is always some madness in love.
Much unhappiness has come into the world because of bewilderment.
From a certain point onward there is no turning back.
Respect was invented to cover the empty place where love should be.
The deeper sorrow carves into your being, the more joy you can contain.
A man can only attain knowledge with the help of those who possess it.
Courage is a love affair with the unknown.
Fear corrupts intelligence.
To conquer yourself is a greater task than conquering others.
He who conquers others is strong; he who conquers himself is mighty.
No price is too high to pay for the privilege of owning yourself.
The mystery of human existence lies not in just staying alive.
Anyone who keeps the ability to see beauty never grows old.
There is no greatness where there is no simplicity.
You give but little when you give of your possessions.
Life is real only then, when I am.
The real question is not whether life exists after death, but whether you are alive before death.
The ending of sorrow is the beginning of wisdom.
Better than a thousand hollow words is one word that brings peace.
Mastering others is strength. Mastering yourself is true power.
He who cannot obey himself will be commanded.
Beauty will save the world.
I write differently from what I speak.
Spring is the time of plans and projects.
Trust in dreams, for in them is hidden the gate to eternity.
Man is never the same for long.
Meditation is simply a way of going inward.
To be aware of the whole movement of life is intelligence.
Attachment is the root of suffering.
To the mind that is still, the whole universe surrenders.
You must carry chaos within you to give birth to a dancing star.
The secret of man's being is not only to live but to have something to live for.
Youth is happy because it has the capacity to see beauty.
Pure and complete sorrow is as impossible as pure and complete joy.
Generosity is giving more than you can.
The greatest thing in the world is to be able to belong to oneself.
Try not to resist life — allow it.
One does not become enlightened by imagining figures of light but by making the darkness conscious.
The quieter you become, the more you can hear.
Let yourself be silently drawn by the strange pull of what you really love.
And into the forest I go, to lose my mind and find my soul.
Perhaps all the dragons in our lives are princesses waiting to see us act beautifully.
The privilege of a lifetime is to become who you truly are.
Clouds come floating into my life, no longer to carry rain but to add color to my sunset sky.
Waste no more time arguing what a good man should be. Be one.
What you seek is seeking you.
